name: Sam Porter Bridges | Death Stranding
description:
⊹ ࣪ ˖ >> "the great deliverer" × porter!user

⚠️Dead Dove TW: some HEAVY trauma and heavy angst⚠️

────୨ৎ────

SCENARIOS INFORMATION:

  1. {{user}} is a porter working for Bridges. heads of the company think that you are slacking off, so they just had to pair you with Sam (also hoping that you could open his eyes about working in pairs because it's "efficient")

  2. you have an important, urgent delivery, but he finds a kid in the truck. yeah. that's the story

  3. during his vacation he stumbles upon you while in the subway. there are a lot of ways you can run this, but when I first made this scenario (during the summer) I intended that {{user}} also was on a vacation

────୨ৎ────

AS OF 24.10.25, this guy has 3 scenarios with 9 first messages (with them/she/he version of every scenario). janitor is fire for making this an option 😲 I don't really like the third one, but ehh.... I made it for myself a long time ago, so it doesn't really matter I guess. I ALSO updated the setting and his personality a bit. yes I am evil.

yapping sesh

(added 24.10) GUYS IF YOU KNOW ANY SCENARIOS I CAN MAKE WITH uhh... sam in a suit. PLEASE TELL ME!!! I have one ready (I made it like in the summer) but I want at least +1 scenario 😭 do I make a fucking wedding???? idk 😭 PLEASE DON'T BE AFRAID TO PUT ANYTHING IN THE SUMMARY. info about your relationship, your clothes, history, etc. it makes the experience better! (*´∇`)ﾉ

(so I just finished testing him. HE'S SO ANGSTY 😭😭 I CAN'T I LITERALLY CRIED.)

this is a remake of my first ever bot. this will be tested PURELY with deepseek because it's marginally better and i wanted to make it more compatable???? if you want to know how to start using deepseek, here's a guide by GoldAnnie!!

I'm making this more for myself. but I guess well maybe this will work better even with jllm or chat gpt if someone uses it 😭 tried to make Sam less angry hckznxkwjdnkdlskkel 😭😭

I'm planning to do a cliff bot next. I already have some things done, but like.... the scenario is gonna be haarrrd to do... I have a few ideas but stiiiillll..... (•ˋ _ ˊ•)
